title: Personal
text:
I’m originally from Nara, Japan. I’m enthusiastic about watching sports, especially baseball and basketball.



Kyocera Dome Osaka: Orix Buffaloes

title: Hideo Ishima
text:
Hideo ISHIMA is an associate professor of political science at Kyoto University.
I’m on leave for the academic year 2025-26, visiting at the University of Michigan.
Address: Graduate School of Law, Kyoto University, Yoshida-Honmachi, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto. 606-8501
mail: ishima.hideo.3r [at] kyoto-u.ac.jp

title: About
text:
I received my Ph.D. in Political Science from Kyoto University in 2019. From 2021, I am an associate professor of Political Science at Kyoto University.
My research focuses on political parties, legislative behavior, and Japanese politics. It has been published in Electoral Studies, Legislative Studies Quarterly, Journal of Election, Public Opinion and Parties, and Social Science Japan Journal.
Please find my detailed CV.



Kyoto University
